text.message: He’ll trade for brick even without the nb
i havent even put down a road
Blue plucked my wheat, so he has one now
You had a city in hand again?
Oh, i thought you did previously too
think we're getting double played here
Black’s production is off the hook
oj must have rb that made no sense
I’ve been waiting 3 orbits to connect
you should now, oj def has rb
Oh, you mean 2 pips. Yeah, it’s the RB card we care about, not the resourc3es
Yeah, black flips a knight to win
you need this to pop oj?
